variables.name: CanActivelyGraspObje_Abletograde
variables.description: Can Actively Grasp Objects: Able to grade grasp with lightly resistive media such as paper or clothing without crushing while other hand manipulates.

variables.name: CanActivelyGraspObje_Activeopeni
variables.description: Can Actively Grasp Objects: Active opening of fingers, but may have adducted thumb on approach to and grasp of object.

variables.name: CanActivelyGraspObje_Canholdpape
variables.description: Can Actively Grasp Objects: Can hold paper to cut out a circle with the other hand. Affected hand able to turn paper for cutting.

variables.name: CanActivelyGraspObje_Canperformp
variables.description: Can Actively Grasp Objects: Can perform pad-to-pad pinch to pick up Cheerios one at a time but may have adducted thumb.

variables.name: CanActivelyGraspObje_Canpointwit
variables.description: Can Actively Grasp Objects: Can point with an extended finger (at least partial isolated while other fingers are out of the way).

variables.name: CanActivelyGraspObje_Canrakesmal
variables.description: Can Actively Grasp Objects: Can rake small beans and grasp.

variables.name: CanActivelyGraspObje_Canretainob
variables.description: Can Actively Grasp Objects: Can retain object against moderate resistance while other hand manipulates (i.e., remove lid from marker).

variables.name: CanActivelyGraspObje_Hasfunction
variables.description: Can Actively Grasp Objects: Has functional shoulder, elbow or hand movement towards an object in front of patient.

variables.name: CanActivelyGraspObje_Hassomesupi
variables.description: Can Actively Grasp Objects: Has some supination to reach for a vertically oriented object.

variables.name: CanActivelyGraspObje_Hassomewris
variables.description: Can Actively Grasp Objects: Has some wrist extension during release in space

variables.name: CanActivelyGraspObje_Hasvolunta1
variables.description: Can Actively Grasp Objects: Has voluntary release, but may use surface to release object.

variables.name: CanActivelyGraspObje_Hasvolunta2
variables.description: Can Actively Grasp Objects: Has voluntary release in space.

variables.name: CanActivelyGraspObje_Rakesandhas
variables.description: Can Actively Grasp Objects: Rakes and has gross grasp of small block (1x1), (but has no pad-to-pad or tip-to-tip finger prehension).

variables.name: CanActivelyGraspObje_Usesbodytoh
variables.description: Can Actively Grasp Objects: Uses body to help stabilize object against resistance while other hand manipulates (remove lid from marker).

variables.name: CanHoldObjectandStab_Attemptsrel
variables.description: Can Hold Object and Stab: Attempts release, but other hand may assist by pulling object out of grasp.

variables.name: CanHoldObjectandStab_Bringshandt
variables.description: Can Hold Object and Stab: Brings hand to mouth if other hand is blocked, but does not have to reach mouth with fingers (pronated forearm).

variables.name: CanHoldObjectandStab_Makesfistan
variables.description: Can Hold Object and Stab: Makes fist and uses arm to stabilize objects like paper or toys on a surface while the other hand manipulates.

variables.name: CanHoldObjectandStab_Retainsitem
variables.description: Can Hold Object and Stab: Retains item long enough for other hand to attempt interaction/manipulation.

variables.name: CanHoldOntoObjectPla_Attemptstor
variables.description: Can Hold Onto Object Placed in Hand: Attempts to relax or open palm for observer to place an object in the hand, but may not be able to fully make an open, flat palm.

variables.name: CanHoldOntoObjectPla_Consistentv
variables.description: Can Hold Onto Object Placed in Hand: Consistent volitional shoulder, elbow or hand movement towards an object in front or to side of patient.

variables.description: Can Perform Bimanual Ac: Can bring item in hand to mouth with forearm supination.

variables.name: CanPerformBimanualAc_Canperforms
variables.description: Can Perform Bimanual Ac: Can perform simple rotation of an object turning it over ? revolution with thumb, index, and long fingers.

variables.name: CanPerformBimanualAc_Thumbableto
variables.description: Can Perform Bimanual Ac: Thumb able to oppose somewhat to pick up small items in a tip-to-tip pinch.
